prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda P07A turbocharged 660cc inline-3** (from the Honda Life Type Z Turbo) with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (GT1241Z, 0.35 A/R turbine housing) and **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** for reduced lag and improved spool response. Retain the stock internals but upgrade to **JUN forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** and **Toda Racing billet crankshaft** to handle 22 psi of boost, targeting **180+ hp at the wheels** on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** for precise mapping.

Full **Spoon Sports** drivetrain reinforcement: **Spoon carbon driveshaft**, **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way)**, and **N1-spec clutch (triple-plate)** to handle the torque spike. Replace the stock 5-speed manual with a **Honda Fit RS 6-speed manual transmission** (gearbox code: **MZH**) paired with a **Spoon short shifter** and **Nismo RS01 shift knob** for quicker throws.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Honda Zest-specific valving)** and **Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow)**. Install **Spoon Sports rear lower arms** with **polyurethane bushings** and **Cusco 2-point rear sway bar (16mm)** to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to **Project Mu B-Spec 266mm front rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Spoon Sports stainless steel brake lines** for fade resistance.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Zest Sport widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon hood**), paired with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1700mm span)** for aggressive downforce. Paint in **Honda Championship White (NH-0)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars for contrast.

Interior stripped and fitted with **Recaro SRD-II seats (JDM-spec, fixed-back)** and **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**. Replace the stock steering wheel with a **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede)** and add a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (boost, oil temp, wideband AFR)** mounted on a **Spoon Sports A-pillar pod**.

Lightweight **SSR Professor SP1 wheels (15x7 +38 offset)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R (195/50R15)** for maximum grip. **Spoon Sports titanium exhaust (4-2-1 header, 60mm tip)** with **Burns Stainless muffler** for a deep, aggressive tone. **JDM-spec Honda Zest Sport side decals (red/black)** and **C-West rear diffuser** complete the look.
